principles: We charge for the value we create, not just the hours we work
Free consultation and honest assessment - we find root causes, not just symptoms
Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
You approve the price before we start any work
Senior and community-friendly rates for those who need it most
differentiation: Unlike big box stores, we won't try to sell you a new computer when yours can be fixed
Unlike national chains, we offer genuine community-focused services like our Senior Tech Safety Net
We invest time in understanding your needs, not upselling products you don't need

paymentTerms.residential: Payment due upon completion. Cash, check, or major credit cards accepted.
paymentTerms.business: Net 15 terms for established business clients. Monthly retainer clients billed automatically.
paymentTerms.warranty: All work comes with a 30-day satisfaction guarantee
